name: Dean's List Awards - 3x Academic Excellence
desc: Earned 3 Dean's List Awards for academic excellence with CGPA of 3.95, 3.89, and 3.75+ across consecutive semesters by maintaining top performance while building 15+ projects and publishing research.

name: Web & Data Summit 2024 - Participation
desc: Participated in the Web & Data Summit 2024, gaining insights into cutting-edge web technologies and data science practices from industry experts.

name: AIUB CS FEST 2024 - 1st Runner Up
desc: Won 1st Runner-Up at AIUB CS FEST 2024 App Showcase competing against 20+ teams evaluated by industry judges by demonstrating innovative mobile development with polished UI/UX and presentation.

name: Published Research - Taylor & Francis (IDAA 2025)
desc: Published a Taylor & Francis Book Chapter on medical AI at IDAA 2025 — an international conference indexed by major databases by benchmarking BioBERT, PubMedBERT, and BERT for multi-label adverse drug reaction classification.

name: South Asian Climate Conference 2024
desc: Presented original climate research at an international conference demonstrating statistical findings on South Asian climate trends by conducting data collection, statistical modeling, and visualization of regional environmental data.

name: GitHub Open Source - 60+ Stars
desc: Accumulated 60+ GitHub stars across 26 repositories with the top project (Student Management System) earning 17 stars and 8 forks by building well-documented, production-grade open source projects with comprehensive Wikis.

name: Mario's Multiverse Adventure - Game Dev
desc: Led a team of 5 to ship a 2D platformer with 3 unique levels and a physics engine earning 4 GitHub forks by building a custom OpenGL rendering engine with SFML audio and SQLite persistence in C++.

name: Spotify Sentiment Analysis - 85-90% Accuracy
desc: Classified sentiment of 52,702 Spotify reviews with 85-90% accuracy benchmarked against precision/recall/F1 metrics by building a 17-task ML pipeline with TF-IDF vectorization and Multinomial Naive Bayes.

name: Certified Ethical Hacker - Team Matrix
desc: Certified Ethical Hacker through a 4-month, 29-module offensive security program passing 3 exams (theoretical, lab, viva) by performing penetration tests on live servers, exploiting OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, and completing CTF and bug bounty engagements.

name: 54+ Android Development Lessons
desc: Completed comprehensive Android development curriculum from beginner to advanced. Mastered MVVM architecture, Retrofit, Hilt, RxJava3, Room Database, and Firebase integration.
